attributes.description: Dashboard for audit logs from Microsoft Intune Audit

panelsJSON.title: Events by Actor Type [Logs Microsoft Intune Audit]
Events by Category [Logs Microsoft Intune Audit]

params.markdown:
**Microsoft Intune**

**Overview**

This dashboard provides a concise overview of Audit logs, helping monitor administrative and operational activities. It highlights total events, success vs. failure rates, event trends over time, top operations, and most active actors.

The dashboard also shows actions by actor type, delegated admin activity, events by application, and a summary of modified properties (including old and new values). An essential audit details view supports quick investigation by displaying key fields such as operation name, actor UPN, targets, result type, and correlation ID.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/microsoft_intune/overview)
